prompts.title: Liquidity Hunt Chart
prompts.prompt: Dark trading chart background with XAU/USD candlestick chart, dramatic red spike showing stop loss hunt below support level, then sharp reversal upward, annotations showing 'SL Zone' with red markers and 'Reversal' with green arrow, professional financial visualization style, dark navy blue (#1a1a2e) background, gold (#f0a500) accent lines, high contrast, cinematic lighting, 4K quality

prompts.title: Order Block Zone
prompts.prompt: Professional trading chart showing XAU/USD with highlighted Order Block zone in amber/gold color, bullish impulse move originating from the zone, clean price action visualization, dark background (#1a1a2e), gold rectangle marking the OB area, white candlesticks, labeled annotations 'Order Block' and 'Demand Zone', Bloomberg terminal aesthetic, ultra-realistic

prompts.title: Smart Money vs Retail
prompts.prompt: Split-screen infographic: left side shows retail trader (small fish) with emotional chart patterns, right side shows Smart Money (shark/whale) with calculated market structure moves, dark navy background, gold and white color scheme, minimal modern design, icons representing institutional trading vs retail panic, professional financial education style

prompts.title: Fair Value Gap Visualization
prompts.prompt: Clean trading chart showing three consecutive candlesticks creating a Fair Value Gap (FVG/Imbalance), gap highlighted with semi-transparent gold rectangle, price returning to fill the gap then continuing the trend, dark theme chart, educational annotations with arrows and labels, professional TradingView-style visualization, high resolution

prompts.title: Market Structure BOS CHOCH
prompts.prompt: Technical chart showing market structure with clear Break of Structure (BOS) and Change of Character (CHOCH) labels, Higher Highs and Higher Lows marked in green, then structure break with red CHOCH annotation, dark background, clean professional charting style, educational diagram quality, gold and red accent colors

prompts.title: Trading Psychology Emotional Cycle
prompts.prompt: Circular infographic showing trader emotional cycle: Optimism → Excitement → Thrill → Euphoria → Anxiety → Denial → Fear → Panic → Capitulation → Despondency → Depression → Hope → Relief → Optimism, dark navy background, each emotion color-coded from green to red to green, modern financial psychology design, clean typography

prompts.title: Discipline Over Emotion
